description: v2.0: Expanded error taxonomy with 20 error classes for adversarial testing. Integrates into tester workflow with classification prompts, self-reflection triggers, and orchestrator routing hints.

off_by_one.description: Boundary condition errors — wrong comparison operator, list/index out of bounds
off_by_one.resolution_strategy: Architect must redraw the algorithm flow with exact boundary definitions
off_by_one.test_generation_hint: Test: empty array, single element, max size, exactly N-1, exactly N+1

null_pointer.description: Null/undefined/nil not handled — missing nil checks, dereferencing nil
null_pointer.resolution_strategy: Architect must specify ALL nil cases in edge-cases.md before retry
null_pointer.test_generation_hint: Test: nil input, empty response, field removed, optional omitted

race_condition.description: Concurrency issues — no synchronization, shared state corrupted
race_condition.resolution_strategy: Architect must redesign with explicit locking/synchronization. Escalate to Sai.
race_condition.test_generation_hint: Test: 100 concurrent requests, simultaneous cancels, parallel workers

missing_edge_case.description: Valid input not handled — empty, max, min, boundary values
missing_edge_case.resolution_strategy: Add the missing edge case to edge-cases.md, implement handling
missing_edge_case.test_generation_hint: Test: empty, 0, -1, 1, INT_MAX, INT_MIN, max_length, unicode, special chars

api_contract_violation.description: Backend/frontend API mismatch — response shape, status codes, field names
api_contract_violation.resolution_strategy: Backend and Frontend must both confirm api-contract.md alignment (API-SYNC gate)
api_contract_violation.test_generation_hint: Test: missing field, wrong type, extra field, auth failure, rate limit

security_vulnerability.description: Security flaw — injection, auth bypass, data exposure, escalation
security_vulnerability.resolution_strategy: ESCALATE IMMEDIATELY to Sai. Do not retry. This is a production security risk.
security_vulnerability.test_generation_hint: Test: injection payloads, auth token missing, privilege escalation attempts, data exposure

memory_leak.description: Resource not released — memory accumulates, connections not closed
memory_leak.resolution_strategy: Architect must redesign resource lifecycle management
memory_leak.test_generation_hint: Test: long-running operation, 100 iterations, check memory/connections before and after

timeout_deadlock.description: Wait condition never satisfied — infinite wait, premature timeout, deadlock
timeout_deadlock.resolution_strategy: Test with various timeout values. If architecturally wrong, escalate.

state_corruption.description: Invalid state transition — no validation, state machine broken
state_corruption.resolution_strategy: Architect must define full state machine in architecture docs
state_corruption.test_generation_hint: Test: invalid state transitions, concurrent state changes, schema evolution

resource_exhaustion.description: No limits on resource usage — memory, disk, network, CPU unbounded
resource_exhaustion.resolution_strategy: Architect must specify resource limits and fallback behavior
resource_exhaustion.test_generation_hint: Test: 1000 items, max load, disk full, network slow, memory limit exceeded

infra.description: Infrastructure failure — network, disk, memory, service unavailable
infra.resolution_strategy: Switch to backup resource or wait for recovery. DevOps handles infra.
infra.test_generation_hint: Test: kill -9 mid-operation, network partition, disk full, OOM kill

architecture.description: Architecture flaw — wrong approach, infeasible design, missing component
architecture.resolution_strategy: Restart architecture loop with more research. Escalate to Sai if 2nd failure.
architecture.test_generation_hint: Test: validate the architecture's assumptions on real infra before retry

coding.description: Implementation error — logic bug, wrong import, type mismatch, compilation error
coding.resolution_strategy: Fix specific error, redeploy to staging, re-test
coding.test_generation_hint: Test: compile/check types, verify logic with known inputs

testing.description: Test suite issue — flaky test, missing coverage, assertion error in tests
testing.resolution_strategy: Fix test or implementation. If test is wrong, fix test first.
testing.test_generation_hint: Re-run tests multiple times to detect flakiness. Check test isolation.

deployment.description: Deployment failure — rollback required, config error, health check failed
deployment.resolution_strategy: Rollback to previous known-good state. DevOps handles. Retry or escalate.
deployment.test_generation_hint: Test: clean deploy, upgrade deploy, rollback, restart mid-operation

ambiguity.description: Requirement ambiguity — unclear spec, conflicting requirements, missing context
ambiguity.resolution_strategy: ESCALATE IMMEDIATELY to Sai. Cannot proceed without clarification.
ambiguity.test_generation_hint: Flag as BLOCKING — no testing possible until ambiguity resolved

access.description: Access/credentials issue — credentials missing, network blocked, firewall reject
access.resolution_strategy: ESCALATE IMMEDIATELY to Sai. Needs human to provide/fix credentials.
access.test_generation_hint: Test: expired token, wrong credentials, network partition, firewall block

rollback_plan_missing.description: No rollback strategy defined — if this fails, there's no recovery plan
rollback_plan_missing.resolution_strategy: Architect must define rollback plan in deployment-plan.md before retry
rollback_plan_missing.test_generation_hint: Simulate failure at each step and verify rollback works

data_loss_risk.description: Operation can lose data — no durability guarantees, partial writes
data_loss_risk.resolution_strategy: ESCALATE IMMEDIATELY to Sai. Data loss risk is unacceptable.
data_loss_risk.test_generation_hint: Test: kill mid-operation, network loss mid-transfer, source deleted during copy

unknown.description: Unclassified error — unexpected exception, unknown failure mode
unknown.resolution_strategy: Log full context. Attempt max retries. Classify new error types. Then escalate.
unknown.test_generation_hint: Add instrumentation to capture full error context. Try to reproduce.

resolutionStrategies.off_by_one: Re-examine boundary conditions. Write exact boundary definitions. Test with exact boundary values.
resolutionStrategies.null_pointer: Add nil/null checks at every entry point. Specify default values for all optional fields.
resolutionStrategies.race_condition: Redesign with proper synchronization. Add mutex/lock. Test with 100 concurrent requests.
resolutionStrategies.missing_edge_case: List ALL edge cases in edge-cases.md. Implement handling for each. Test each explicitly.
resolutionStrategies.api_contract_violation: Both backend and frontend must re-read api-contract.md. Confirm alignment in API-SYNC gate.
resolutionStrategies.security_vulnerability: ESCALATE IMMEDIATELY. Do not retry. Fix before any deployment.
resolutionStrategies.memory_leak: Add resource tracking. Verify cleanup in finally/defer. Test long-running with memory monitoring.
resolutionStrategies.timeout_deadlock: Test with various timeout values. If architectural, escalate. If implementation, fix.
resolutionStrategies.state_corruption: Define full state machine. Add validation at every transition. Test invalid transitions.
resolutionStrategies.resource_exhaustion: Add explicit limits. Add circuit breakers. Add fallback behavior. Test at limits.
resolutionStrategies.infra: Wait for recovery or switch to backup. DevOps handles infra issues.
resolutionStrategies.architecture: Restart architecture loop with more research. If 2nd failure, escalate to Sai.
resolutionStrategies.testing: Fix test suite first, then verify implementation.
resolutionStrategies.ambiguity: ESCALATE IMMEDIATELY to Sai with specific questions.
resolutionStrategies.access: ESCALATE IMMEDIATELY to Sai. Needs human.
resolutionStrategies.rollback_plan_missing: Architect must write complete rollback plan before retry.
resolutionStrategies.data_loss_risk: ESCALATE IMMEDIATELY. Add transaction/atomicity before retry.
resolutionStrategies.unknown: Classify error. Add instrumentation. Try to reproduce. Escalate if 2nd retry fails.

critical.description: Must not deploy. Immediate human review required.

high.description: Architecture must be redesigned or specific fix required before retry.

medium.description: Can retry with specific fix guidance.

low.description: Minor issue. Can proceed or fix in next iteration.
